description_long: A wooden tray holds a white ceramic plate with two donuts and a matching white cup and saucer filled with a red beverage. One donut is topped with chocolate glaze and colorful sprinkles, while the other features a caramel or light brown glaze with white icing drizzle and sprinkled nuts. The plate is round and slightly raised, providing a clean presentation for the donuts. The cup is filled nearly to the brim, and its handle is visible in several views. The tray itself is rectangular with a smooth, matte finish, and all items are neatly arranged on its surface. The overall scene suggests a café or street-side snack setup, with the donuts and drink ready to be enjoyed.
description: A wooden tray displays two decorated donuts on a white plate alongside a white cup of red beverage, creating a café-style snack arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cup behind the plate, with both donuts and their toppings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Cup is positioned to the right of the plate, partially obscured by the donuts, with the tray's surface visible.
description_view_2: Cup is now in front of the plate, with the donuts slightly behind, emphasizing the cup's handle and saucer.
description_view_3: Cup is closest to the viewer, with the plate and donuts further back, showing the cup's opening and beverage.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze with sprinkles on one donut, caramel or light brown glaze with white icing drizzle on the other
attribute_placement_location: on a white plate atop a wooden tray
